overall.description: A smooth elevator ascent through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, revealing towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by neon billboards and holographic advertisements. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), characterized by its distinctive teal and blue color grading with vibrant neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator shaft ascending through building interior

events.description: city lights and illuminated skyscrapers become visible as elevator ascends out of the dark shaft
exits enclosed concrete shaft into open view of the cyberpunk cityscape

agents.ego_description: rising steadily in an elevator, transitioning from dark interior shaft to panoramic city views

entered.detail: dark concrete elevator shaft wall with rough texture
angled metal structural frame surrounding the elevator window
tall skyscraper with blue illuminated windows and neon accents
high-rise building with regular grid pattern of yellow-lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark concrete elevator shaft with minimal visibility. As the elevator ascends, the city skyline gradually emerges into view around 8 seconds, transitioning from enclosed darkness to an expansive night view of illuminated skyscrapers. The metal window frame remains visible throughout, framing the emerging cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator ascending through open air between downtown skyscrapers

events.description: first major holographic billboard with 'SOYO' text becomes visible on nearby building
large pink neon billboard reading 'FEEL THE RUSH' comes into view on left side

agents.ego_description: continuing upward journey through the canyon of skyscrapers, passing illuminated billboards and towers

entered.detail: large holographic billboard displaying 'SOYO' text with white lettering
vibrant pink and purple neon billboard with stylized text
illuminated advertisement showing a human figure
multi-level highway system with moving vehicle lights visible below

segments.scene_description: The elevator continues ascending through open air between towering skyscrapers. The view expands to show a dense cyberpunk cityscape with prominent holographic billboards including 'SOYO' and 'FEEL THE RUSH'. Vehicle traffic becomes visible on the elevated highways below, and the camera passes various illuminated glass towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-altitude aerial view of dense urban core surrounded by skyscrapers

events.description: elevator begins to slow as it approaches the upper floors and destination

agents.ego_description: nearing the end of the ascent, surrounded by the upper levels of skyscrapers and rooftop structures

entered.detail: massive dark skyscraper facade with scattered illuminated windows passing by closely
bright pink circular neon sign on building facade
large advertisement displaying a figure in red against yellow background
mechanical equipment and antenna arrays on building rooftops

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the elevator approaching the upper levels of the city, surrounded by the tops of skyscrapers. The view is dominated by close-up building facades, rooftop mechanical structures, and dense clusters of neon signage. The ascent slows as the elevator nears its destination, providing an intimate view of the high-rise architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vertical ascent from the depths of a dark industrial shaft into the luminous heights of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. It begins within the enclosed darkness of a concrete elevator shaft, where the city skyline gradually emerges through a metal window frame as the lift rises. As the camera breaks into the open air, the view expands to reveal a dense cityscape of towering glass skyscrapers, holographic billboards for SOYO and FEEL THE RUSH, and the flowing lights of vehicle traffic on elevated highways below. The scene then shifts toward the upper reaches of the city, moving closer to the intricate building facades and rooftop mechanical structures. Finally, the ascent slows as the camera settles among dense clusters of neon signage and high-rise architecture at the top of the city.
